title: Lungleiah District Disposal Committee-in ruihhlo (heroin no. 4) ₹18,88,400/- man hu an hal ral
content:
52/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 6:Vawiin tlai khan Lunglei AP Tlanga Incinerator Centre-ah Lunglei District Disposal Committee (DCC) chuan ruihhlo (heroin no. 4) gram 51 (₹18,88,400/- man hu) an hal ral.

Ruihhlo hal ralnaah hian DDC member-te – Lunglei District Superintendent of Police, Lunglei Sub-Divisional Officer (Sadar), Lunglei Excise & Narcotics Assistant Commissioner, Lunglei Sub-Divisional Police Officer leh an ai awhte an tel a. Heroin hal ral tak hi Lunglei Police Station Case No.15/2026 Dt. 22.02.2026 u/s 21(b)/25/29 ND&PS Act hnuaia case ziah luh niin, Lunglei Judicial Magistrate First Class-I-in phalna a pek anga hal ral (pre-trial dispose) a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP-IN CYLA HRUAITU THARTE KAWM
content:
51/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 6th April 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a Office Chamber-ah CYLA hruaitu tharte kawmna a nei a. Pu David Lalrinawma, Addl. DC chuan a tawiawm a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan CYLA hruaitu tharte lawmpuina leh duhsakna a hlan hmasa a. NGO lian ber leh pawimawh ber an nihna angin, Lawngtlai mipuite tan theihtawp chhuah zel turin a fuih a. Sawrkarin a kalpui mek Ruihhlo do (Operation Jericho ) leh kawng dangah thahnemngai taka thawhpui turin a sawm a. Sawrkar Department - ten hmalakna tha tak an neihna turah CYLA chu a daitheutu pawimawh tak an ni tiin, ram leh hnam tana thawhpuiah a sawm a. Ruihhlo do kawngah CYLA hnuaia Drug Reduction Squad (DRS) te chak zawka hmalak zel tura a beisei thu a tarlang a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Foreigners- chungchangah hmalakna tur tam tak a awm a, sumdawnna kawngah SOP felfai tak siam a tul hle tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian inkaihhruaina khauh taka kalpui a nih tur thu sawiin, CYLA te thawhpuiah a sawm a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan CYLA- te chu Lawngtlai District - tana kut leh ke ber an nihna angin, Lawngtlai District- hmasawnna tura theihtawp chhuaha thawhpui zel turin a sawm a ni.

Pu F. Lalrothanga, President, CYLA chuan Bawrhsap- in Lawngtlai District hmasawnna tura thahnem ngai taka hma a la thin chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Bawrhsap chak tak hmalakna chu CYLA chuan a thlawp tlat tih tarlangin, Lawngtlai district hmasawnna turah CYLA an tlanchhe ngai dawn lo tih sawiin, tha taka sawrkar an thlawp tur thu a tarlang a. Hruaitu thlan thar chauh nimahse chak taka hmalak a nih thu sawiin, Central Executive Commitee (CEC) - thutkhawm hunah hmalakna tur hrang hrangte siamfel a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Pu JH. Lalrindika, General Secretary chuan Bawrhsap hova thutkhawm neih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Sawrkar leh CYLA - inkarah thawhhona tha a awm zel a beisei tih a tarlang a. Lawngtlai District hmasawnna turah CYLA - ten theihtawp an chhuah tur thu sawiin, Sawrkar Commitee - peng hrang hrangah NGO telna awmah CYLA - te tel zel a tul hle a ti a. Lawngtlai District hmasawnna turah CYLA - ten theihtawp an chhuah zel tur thu a sawi bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian Central Young Lai Association (CYLA) Office Bearers (2026-2028) te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: SPEAKER-IN WRESTLER LALHMANGAIHSANGI THINGPUI INPUI
content:
50/2026-2027

6th April, 2026:Nl. Lalhmangaihsangi, Dilkhan khua, Khelo India a Bronze Medalist chu Assembly Speaker, Chalfilh A/C MLA ni bawk Pu Lalbiakzama chuan a office chamber-ah vawiin khan thingpui a inpui.

Hmangaihsangi hi March ni 28-31, 2026 chhunga “Khelo India Tribal Games”,  Ambikapur, Chattisgarh-a neih zawh takah khan Mizoram aiawhin 76kg hnuai lam huangah khelin, “Bronze Medal” a la a ni.

Assembly Speaker Pu Zamtea chuan hetiang ang mi talent nei tha a bial chhunga mi an awm chu a chhuan zia lan tir nan a office-a lengah sawmin,  lawmpuina thu ziak (citation) a hlan bakah thingpui a inpui a. National level a zo chhul chhuakte kan lang hi a ropui takzet a, midang te tan entawn tlaka nun fimkhura, nasa lehzuala tan la zel turin a fuih a ni.

Mizoram Wrestling Association President Pu Ngurthansanga, Joint Secretary & Team Manager Hmangaihhlima, Financial Secretary F.Lalmalsawma ten Lalhmangaihsangi hi an ṭawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip District DPAC an thukhawm
content:
48/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 4th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Programme Advisory Committee (DPAC) chu an Chairman DC Pu Paul L Khuma hovin DC Meeting Room-ah an thukhawm a. Kum 2025-2026 chhunga an hmalakna tur Annual Work Plan (AWP) an sawi.

DIET Principal Pi Jane Vanlalmuanpuii chuan an hmalakna tura ruahmanna an neihte sawiin, Trafficking chungchangah Community Awareness neih tur a ni a. Elementary School hrang hrang 5 hnenah School Support pein, an zirna kaihhnawih atana mamawhte an pe ang a. Elementary School tan vek hian District huapin Science Fest buatsaih a ni bawk ang. Pre School Teacher Education tana buatsaih Teaching Learning Material (TLM) design competition pawh buatsaih tawh niin, endik fel tawh a nih thu a sawi a. Heng an hmachhawp te leh an hmalakna tura an chhawpte hi Committee chuan a pawmpui a ni.

Attachment

title: Social Welfare leh Mizoram Synod hotuten Jordan Center an tlawh
content:
47/2026-2027

6th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Social Welfare Department hotute leh Mizoram Synod hotuten an enfiah a. Social Welfare Department hi Joint Secretary Pi Zonunthari hovin offial 5 an kal a, Mizoram Synod lam hi Moderator Rev John Raldosanga bakah Synod Social Front atangin Rev K. Lallawmzuala, Executive Secretary, Rev P. Zohmangaiha, Secretary, Rev. Lalrinmawia leh member dang mi 3 an kal a ni.

Jordan Center hi Mizoram Sorkar chuan Mizoram Synod enkawl turin inremna kum 15 atan a lo ziah pui tawh a. A hmunhna, building leh a chhung bungrua awm te hi a nih ang ang a inpek turin an lo inrem tawh a ni.

Jordan Center ah hian Qtrs building 9, chhungkaw 30 vel awm theihna te, Office building, damdawi in bakah hmeichhia leh mipa ruihhlo ngai enkawlna hmun a hrang ve ve fencing tha tak nen a awm a. Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment norms leh guidelines anga din a nih avangin building hrang hrang Counselling, detox, recreation, dorm, chapel etc a awm kim hle.Tin bungrua hi a awm tha hle bawk a, training equipments pawh tamtak a awm Sa abawk. Building te hi lian vak lo, a hrang hrang a nih avangin tun dinhmunah mi 70-100 bak an leng lova. A za aiin building hand over tur hi 40 a awm a ni Repair ngaite leh thil mamawh belh te enho nghal a ni a. Synod lam hian June thla SEC ah an kalpui dan tur hi an rel fel dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitualah Village Disaster Management Committee huaihawtin chhiatrupna thleng thulha chetlak dan tur Training neih a ni
content:
46/2026-2027

Dated Saitual the 6th April 2026 (Thawhtanni):Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Saitualah Village Disaster Management Committee huaihawtin chhiatrupna thleng thulha chet lak dan tur training neih a ni.

Vawiin Training hi hun hnihah then niin chawhma lamah Er. Lalbiakzuala, Asst. Director (Trg), Dte DM&R chuan Disaster Management chungchanga thil pawimawh hrang hrang tlangpuite leh chhiatrupna hmachhawn dan kawng te training a pe a, chawhnu lamah Pi Zotinkimi, DMV, DDMA, Aizawl District chuan chhiatna hmuna thleng hmasate tana tihtur pawimawh leh tih hmasak turte, chhanchhuah dan bikte, hliam tuarte bawihsawm leh lakchhuah dan turte bakah kangmei chhuak tur ven dan leh first aid hman dante, nunna chhan dan kawng hrang hrangte inhrilhhriatnate traing a pek bakah a taka entirna leh inhrilhfiahnate neih nghal a ni bawk.

Vawiin Training-ah hian Aizawl District Disaster Management Authority – 3, QRT, Saitual District – 3, VDMC -19 te atangin mi 2 theuh an tel thei bawk.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON FIRE PREVENTION HOLDS MEETING AND REVIEWS ACTION PLANS
content:
5/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 6th April 2026:Today, the Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Fire Prevention, under the chairmanship of Deputy Commissioner Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, held a meeting at the DC Conference Hall. During the meeting, various ongoing and proposed fire prevention measures were reviewed.

Shri Donny Lalruatsanga began by expressing his gratitude to all members present. He appreciated the efforts taken by the Committee and encouraged continued dedication and improvement. He highlighted that strong awareness campaigns on fire prevention are commendable and thanked Village Councils (VCs), NGOs, and Churches for their cooperation. He also acknowledged the active participation of different government departments and appreciated the public for adhering to government instructions. Special thanks were extended to media personnel for their role in spreading awareness.

The Deputy Commissioner further expressed satisfaction that no fire incidents have been reported so far this year, attributing this achievement to the collective efforts of government bodies, VCs, NGOs, churches, and the public. He noted that while previous years saw frequent fire incidents, this year’s situation has improved significantly due to strong collaboration. He expressed hope that Lawngtlai District may even receive recognition at the state level. He urged all departments, especially the Forest Department, along with VCs, NGOs, churches, and the public, to remain vigilant against fire hazards.

Shri K. Lalromawia, DCCF, LADC and Member Secretary, presented a brief report stating that no forest fire incidents have been reported in Lawngtlai District so far. He highlighted that government guidelines are being actively implemented. Awareness materials such as flyers and short videos have been produced, and media personnel who contribute articles on fire prevention will be rewarded. Hoardings and stickers are also being prepared and displayed. Awareness campaigns have been conducted in 34 villages, including programs in primary and middle schools.

A report from CADC representatives was also presented, noting effective awareness campaigns and strong cooperation with VCs and NGOs. Regular field inspections are being carried out to monitor fire situations, and no fire incidents have been reported within CADC areas.

During the meeting, discussions were held on past initiatives and future strategies. The Committee emphasized the importance of continued collaboration among VCs, NGOs, churches, and the public. It was agreed that ongoing fire prevention efforts should be strengthened, particularly in awareness activities, installation of more fire hydrant and that Prohibitory Orders may be reissued if necessary.

All members of the District Level Committee on Fire Prevention attended the meeting. The session concluded with a vote of thanks by Shri  PC Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police, Lawngtlai.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON FIRE PREVENTION THUTKHAWM NIIN HMALAKNA THLIRHONA AN NEI
content:
45/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 6th April 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Fire Prevention chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall - ah thutkhawm an nei a. District Level Committee on Fire Prevention- hmalakna kawng hrang hrangte THLIRHONA an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. District Level Committee on Fire Prevention- hmalakna fakawm a tih thu sawiin, tha thlah lova hmala chhunzawm zel turin a chah a. Kangmei tichhuak lo tura inzirtirna chak taka kalpui thei a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu tarlangin, VC, NGOs leh Kohhran ten an thawhpuinaah lawmthu a sawi a. Sawrkar department hrang hrangte pawhin tha taka an thawhpui thu sawiin, mipuite pawhin sawrkar thuchhuah an zawm tha hle nia ahriat thu sawiin, Chanchinbu miten theihtawp an chhuahpui kawngah lawmrhu a sawi bawk a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan vawiin thlenga kangmei chhuak report a awmlo chu lawmawm a tih thu tarlangin, sawrkar, VC, NGOs, Kohhran leh mipuite thawhhona tha tak a awm vang a ni tiin, tha taka thawhho zel a beisei thu a sawi a ni. Kum dangah Lawngtlai District- ah kangmei chhuak nasa thin mahse, kumin bikah thawhhona tha tak zarah dinhmun tha tak Lawngtlai District - a awm thu sawiin, Mizoram huapa lawmman lâk ngei a beisei awm thu a sawi a. Kangmei chhuak laka fimkhur zel turin Forest Department bakah department hrang hrangte theihtawp chhuah zel tura chahin Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan VC, NGOs, Kohhran leh Lawngtlai mipuite kangmei laka fimkhur chhunzawm zel turin a sawm nghal bawk.

Pu K. Lalromawia, DCCF,LADC leh Member Secretary nibawk chuan report tawi pekna a nei a. Lawngtlai District bikah tun dinhmunah ram kang 'report' a awm loh thu a tarlang a. Sawrkar thuchhuahte chak taka kalpui a nih thu sawiin, Flyers leh Short Video - te siam a nih thu sawiin chanchinbu mite kangmei laka inven chungchang ziak thate hnenah lawmman pek an nih tur thu a sawi a ni. Kangmei tichhuaklo tura inzirtirna kalpui mek zel a nih thu tarlangin, Hoarding leh Sticker- te pawh siam leh pholan mek a ni, a ti. Kangmei laka fimkhur tura puangzar kawngah VC leh Kohhranah te ngenna siam a nih thu sawiin, Primary leh Middle School - ah te Awareness - kalpui a nih thu sawiin Awareness bikah khua - 34 ah neih a nih thu a tarlang.

CADC aiawh atangin report ngaihthlak a ni bawk a. Awareness tha taka kalpui niin, VC leh NGO- te nen thawhhona tha tak a awm thu ngaihthlak niin, a tul anga a hmunah kala kangmei chhuak awm leh awm loh enfiah thin a nih thu tarlan a ni a. CADC - huamchhungah kangmei chhuak 'report' a awm loh thu ngaihthlak a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Department - te hmalak tawhna thlirho niin hmalak chhunzawm zel dan tur sawiho nghal a ni a. District Level Committee on Fire Prevention - ten hmahruai leh se,VC, NGOs, Kohhran leh mipuite nen thawhhona tha tak neih chhunzawm zel ni se an ti a. Kangmei tichhuak lo tura hmalak tawhna tha ti tlangin, chhunzawm zel ni se, a bik takin ' Awareness ' lamah uar zawka hmalak leh ni se, fire hydrant - dah belh tura hmalak ni se a tul angin 'Prohibitory Order' pawh chhuah nawn leh ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Fire Prevention Member-te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu PC Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police,  chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: DGP-IN ELECTRIC SCOOTER 15 VAILIAM
content:
44/2026-2027

Aizawl the 6th April, 2026 :Pu Sharad Agarwal, IPS, DGP Mizoram chuan Police Modernization hnuai atanga lei Electric Scooter 15, Ather Company siam chu Police Station hrang hrang leh Aizawl Traffic Police hman turin vawiin dar 11:00 a.m. khan Police Headquarters kawt atangin a vai liam. He hunah hian DGP chuan heng Electric Scooter te hi hmeichhiate himna’n leh khawtlang ralmuan zawkna atana hman tura lei a nih thu sawiin, a dawngtu ten Patrolling nan leh khawtlang ralmuanna atan tangkai taka hmang turin a chah a ni. Heng scooter te hi a hnuaia mi ang hian sem a ni:

title: TUIALHTHEI  LEH EIRAWNGBAWLNA GAS RENCHEM CHUNGCHANGA LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP THUCHHUAH
content:
43/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 6th April 2026:Tuialhthei leh eirawngbawlna gas renchem taka kalpui chungchangah a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan thupek a tichhuak.

ORDER

*No.J.11013/1/2025 - DC (LTI): Tunlai khawthlang ram buaina avangin mipui mamawh tuialhthei leh eirawngbawlna gas renchem taka kal pui angaiin mipui ten harsatna kan tawh loh nan ruahmanna siam a tul hle mai a. Hemi chungchang hi state Sawrkar, Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs, Government of Mizoram pawhin ram chhung dinhmun vil rengin district tin a thuneitute, hmalakna kalpui turin a lo hriattir tawh bawk a ni.

Lawngtlai District chhungah pawh Sawrkar duhdan leh hriattirna angin mipui nawlpui ten tuialhthei leh gas a harsatna kan tawh loh nan thupek chhuah a tulin ka hria a, thupek zawm vek turin kan inhriattir a ni.

Chuvangin, kei DONNY LALRUATSANGA, MCS, District, Magistrate hian Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 (BNSS), Section 163 in thuneihna min pek angin he khapna thupek hi ka chhuah e.

1. Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department, Govt. of Mizoram thuchhuah vide B.12013/4/2025 - FCS&CA of Dt. 30.03.2026 angin leh The Petroleum Act, 1934, Section 7 & 8 in a sawi angin Lawngtlai District chhungah Filling Station tin ten mipui nawlpui, license kher ngailo tan nikhatah Petrol litres 30 leh Diesel Litres 1000 (a burin) an pe chhuak tur a ni.

2. Rule 3 of The Petroleum Act, 2002 in a sawi angin phalna neilo/ storage License nei lova tuialhthei phurchhuah a khap a. Lawngtlai District chhungah phalna neilo ten mahni mamawh danin a sawi bak sumdawnna atan emaw hman tur atan an phurchhuak/ kawl khap tlat a ni. Tin, phalna nei lova ramdang Myanmar/Bangladesh a tuialhthei phurchhuah hi dan phalloh a ni a khap tlat a ni bawk.

3. Lawngtlai District chhungah a bik takin eirawngbawlna gas inremchen dam Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department, Govt. of Mizoram thuchhuah vide B.12013/4/2025 - FCS&CA of Dt . 30.03.2026 angin DCSO, Lawngtlai in hma ala bawk ang.

He thupek hian thla hnih(2) chhung a huam anga, a tul dan anga pawhsei / tih tawi theih a ni ang.

Vawiin Dt.01.04.2026 (Wednesday) ni hian District Magistrate Seal a nem nghetin ka hming ka ziah hnan e.

He thupek zawm lo te chu *Section 223, Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 (BNS) leh Section 23, The Petroleum Act, 1934 hmanga hrem a ni ang.

Sd/-DONNY LALRUATSANGADistrict MagistrateLawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

Attachment
